business.name: Barnes Electric Co
business.tagline: Wiring Pensacola right since day one

hero.headline: *That pleasant Southern accent* means quality electrical work
hero.subheadline: Panel replacements, HVAC conversions, new construction — we show up on time and wire it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, every outlet, every panel
services_section.subheading: From simple repairs to complete electrical installations

services.title: Panel Replacements
services.description: Upgrading old electrical panels with modern, safe equipment. Same-day service when you need it most.

services.title: HVAC Electrical Conversions
services.description: Converting gas systems to electric with proper 220V circuits and professional installation.

services.title: New Construction Wiring
services.description: Complete electrical systems for detached units, additions, and new builds. 110V and 220V circuits done right.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: Kitchen pendant lights, outdoor fixtures, and custom lighting solutions that work perfectly.

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Fixing what's broken, upgrading what's outdated. Fast troubleshooting and reliable repairs.

about.heading: Seasoned expertise with a Southern touch
about.body: Barnes Electric Co brings professional electrical service to Pensacola with that pleasant Southern hospitality you want from your contractor. Our team handles everything from emergency panel replacements to complex new construction projects, always showing up on time and getting the job done right.

reviews.name: TJ A.
reviews.text: Outstanding response and service. Panel replacement on short notice with remarkable wiring work at a fair price.

reviews.name: Sharon K.
reviews.text: Extremely helpful with HVAC electrical conversion. On time and professional for both estimate and installation.

reviews.name: Chris D.
reviews.text: Excellent work on our home repairs and complete electrical setup for our new detached unit.

reviews.name: Jessica T.
reviews.text: Great job installing kitchen pendant lights. Professional, fast, and fair pricing. We'll definitely call them again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Greater Pensacola Area
service_areas.subheading: Professional electrical service throughout Northwest Florida

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work done right?
cta.body: Call that pleasant Southern accent you've heard about. Free estimates and honest pricing on all electrical services.
